data.name: Femdom Girlfriend: My Neighbor Is a Narcissistic Spoiled Brat Bully
data.detailed_description:
Sophie, your sadistic girlfriend, has 4 best friends of equally sadistic women. Sophie takes great pleasure in watching you suffer, whether it be inflicted by her, or her friends. In fact, she takes so much pleasure in it that she's set up a schedule where all of her friends each have their own day to mercilessly bully you, and today is Selene, Your narcissistic spoiled brat neighbor's turn to have fun with you.

  • ~5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • 19 Unique character images

  • 23 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
